purpose: Bounded, read-only traffic evidence without unbounded scans or sensitive-field retention.
classificationRules: 401/403/404/410 responses still count as traffic and require attribution.
Any 2xx/3xx legacy call blocks retirement until the consumer is identified and migrated.
Unknown consumer fingerprints must be stable hashes; raw IPs, tokens, cookies, and bodies are prohibited.
A missing runtime in a small sample is not zero-traffic evidence.
